instruction: Building a smiley face step by step (step 5 of 6). So far you've drawn: face, eye-left, eye-right, nose. Add the next part: polyline (points 50,78 64,86 78,78, fill none, stroke #222, stroke-width 2) with id "mouth".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
  <circle id="eye-left" fill="#222" cx="50" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="eye-right" fill="#222" cx="78" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="nose" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="64" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
  <circle id="eye-left" fill="#222" cx="50" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="eye-right" fill="#222" cx="78" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="nose" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="64" r="2" />
  <polyline id="mouth" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="50,78 64,86 78,78" />
</svg>
